subject: Re: GII Seat
body:
also make sure they email us along the way.

----- Original Message ----
From: "kellens@earthlink.net" <kellens@earthlink.net>
To: J J <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Monday, January 8, 2007 7:05:36 PM
Subject: Fw: GII Seat



  



-----Original Message-----

From: JETCARE@aol.com

Date: Mon, 8 Jan 2007 18:49:09 

To:kellens@earthlink.net

Subject: GII Seat



Hi Sarah, 
Please ask JE if he wishes to leave the RH No.3 seat out of the GII.  They are getting ready to cut the carpet and need to know.  If he wants to fly without it for a while to see how he likes it, we can always install the chair at a later date, but not the other way around. 
Thx, 
Larry



__________________________________________________
